/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto -fno-fat-lto-objects -fuse-ld=gold -Wl,--gc-sections -shared -Wl,-soname,libsensor.so -o ../../lib/libsensor.so CMakeFiles/sensor.dir/register.cc.o CMakeFiles/sensor.dir/touch_grid.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/zmy/MyProject/mujoco/build/lib ../../lib/libmujoco.so.3.7.0
